chinese_text:
山有扶蘇，隰有荷華。不見子都，乃見狂且。
山有喬松，隰有游龍。不見子充，乃見狡童。
translation_text:
1 On the mountains is the mulberry tree ;
In the marshes is the lotus flower.
I do not see Tsze-too,
But I see this mad fellow.
